name: fitlog
description: Local-first fitness, nutrition, cardio, and body-composition dashboard deployable on Vercel.

scripts.build: npm run test:training && NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 next build
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test:training: rm -rf .tmp-training-tests && tsc -p tsconfig.training-tests.json && node .tmp-training-tests/scripts/data-foundation.test.js && node .tmp-training-tests/scripts/training-execution.test.js && node .tmp-training-tests/scripts/cycle-planning.test.js && node .tmp-training-tests/scripts/training-history.test.js && node .tmp-training-tests/scripts/training-system.test.js && node .tmp-training-tests/scripts/training-regression.test.js && node .tmp-training-tests/scripts/training-decision.test.js && node .tmp-training-tests/scripts/training-analysis.test.js && node .tmp-training-tests/scripts/integrated-coach.test.js && node .tmp-training-tests/scripts/cut-system.test.js && rm -rf .tmp-training-tests
